# pkgs

Nix package definitions consumed by `overlay.nix` and `flake.nix`; each subdirectory is a self-contained package following the single-`default.nix` convention.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| [cco/](./cco/) | `stdenv.mkDerivation` for `cco` bubblewrap sandbox wrapper; produces `$out/bin/cco` and `$out/bin/cco-sandbox`. Linux-only. |

## Structure

Each package lives in its own subdirectory with a `default.nix` as the sole entry point. Add new packages by creating `pkgs/<name>/default.nix` and referencing it from `overlay.nix`.
